name: NEUROENDOCRINE TUMOR OF LUNG
definition: tumors arising from Kulchitsky cells (normally present in bronchial mucosa) NEUROENDOCRINE CARCINOMA / NEOPLASM poorly differentiated high-grade neuroendocrine tumor as a variant of large-cell carcinoma

demographics.Histo: neuroendocrine morphology = organoid nesting, palisading, rosettes, trabecular growth

demographics.Mean age: 46 (range, 4-95) years; 4% occur in children + adolescents; M÷F = 1÷1; very
demographics.Prevalence: 3% of all resected lung cancers; 19% of pulmonary endocrine tumors; 12% of
